statics.description: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each land card in your graveyard.

triggers.description: Whenever CARDNAME enters or attacks, you may sacrifice a land. If you do, draw a card.
Whenever CARDNAME enters or attacks, you may sacrifice a land. If you do, draw a card.
Whenever a Desert card is put into your graveyard from anywhere, create a 4/2 green Plant Warrior creature token with reach.
